items.title: Iran war: Truce stops clock on Congress approval, says Trump's White House
items.desc: Under war powers legislation, US President Trump has until a Friday deadline to end the Iran war or seek approval from Congress. But the White House says the ceasefire has already "terminated" the conflict. Follow DW.
